task.label: Ensure that applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: applies to the issuance of driving licences in category AM only if so required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: applies to the issuance of driving licences in category AM only if so required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Require a medical examination

conditions.condition: in respect of applications for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

exception.description: regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another category

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: for applications for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

exception.description: regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another category

task.label: Undergo a medical examination covering the medical conditions set out in Annex III

conditions.condition: Before a driving licence is renewed

exception.description: applies to the renewal of driving licences in category AM only if so required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Apply alternative measures instead of requiring a medical examination

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

task.label: Require the applicant or holder of the driving licence to fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: when applying for the issuance or renewal of a driving licence for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

task.label: Fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: If required by the Member State when applying for the issuance or renewal of a driving licence

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

task.label: Provide for appropriate measures to address non-compliance with the requirement to fill in a self-assessment form
Apply the alternative measure in a way that allows the monitoring of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: during periods of administrative validity

task.label: Ensure that the applicant or holder of the driving licence undergoes a medical examination

conditions.condition: prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence
If it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more medical conditions listed in Annex III based on alternative measures

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence
If it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more medical conditions listed in Annex III based on alternative measures

task.label: Take measures to raise awareness about the minimum standards of physical and mental fitness
Take measures to improve the knowledge of the health sector and of driving licence holders about the minimum standards of physical and mental fitness
Adopt guidelines for medical practitioners

conditions.condition: to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet the minimum standards of physical and mental fitness to drive

task.label: Inform the Commission about adopted guidelines for medical practitioners

conditions.condition: If Member States adopt guidelines for medical practitioners

task.label: Make the guidelines available to the other Member States

conditions.condition: If informed about adopted guidelines by Member States

task.label: Develop public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: to inform citizens about mental or physical health conditions that may impair fitness to drive

task.label: Inform the Commission about developed public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: If Member States develop public awareness campaigns

task.label: Make the information about public awareness campaigns available to the other Member States

conditions.condition: If informed about developed public awareness campaigns by Member States

task.label: Set stricter standards for the issuance or renewal of driving licences
